allow: Bash(find modules/Psychology/TradingJournal.Modules.Psychology/Features/V1/Dashboard -name "*.cs" -exec sed -i 's/internal record Request\(\)/internal record Request\(int UserId\)/g' {} \\;)

Bash(find modules/Psychology/TradingJournal.Modules.Psychology/Features/V1/Dashboard -name "*.cs" -exec sed -i 's/internal record Request\(int UserId\)/internal record Request\(int UserId = 0\)/g' {} \\;)
Bash(sed -i 's/int? TradingSessionId\) : ICommand<int? TradingSessionId, int UserId = 0\) : ICommand/' "modules/Trades/TradingJournal.Modules.Trades/Features/V1/Trade/CreateTrade.cs")

Bash(sed -i 's/int? TradingSessionId\) : ICommand<int UserId = 0, int?\\n        int? TradingSessionId\) : ICommand/' "modules/Trades/TradingJournal.Modules.Trades/Features/V1/Trade/UpdateTrade.cs")
Bash(sed -i 's/int? TradingSessionId\) : ICommand/int UserId = 0,\\n        int? TradingSessionId\) : ICommand/' "modules/Trades/TradingJournal.Modules.Trades/Features/V1/Trade/UpdateTrade.cs")

Bash(sed -i 's/th => th.Id == request.Id, cancellationToken: cancellationToken/th => th.Id == request.Id \\&\\& th.CreatedBy == request.UserId, cancellationToken/' "modules/Trades/TradingJournal.Modules.Trades/Features/V1/Trade/UpdateTrade.cs")

Bash(sed -i 's/x => x.Id == request.Id, cancellationToken: cancellationToken/x => x.Id == request.Id \\&\\& x.CreatedBy == request.UserId, cancellationToken/' "modules/Trades/TradingJournal.Modules.Trades/Features/V1/Trade/DeleteTrade.cs")
Bash(sed -i 's/int? TradingSessionId\) : ICommand<int UserId = 0,\\n        int? TradingSessionId\) : ICommand/' "modules/Trades/TradingJournal.Modules.Trades/Features/V1/Trade/CreateTrade.cs")

Bash(sed -i 's/TradeHistory? tradeHistory = await context.TradeHistories.FindAsync\(\\[request.TradeId\\], cancellationToken\);/TradeHistory? tradeHistory = await context.TradeHistories.FirstOrDefaultAsync\(x => x.Id == request.TradeId \\&\\& x.CreatedBy == request.UserId, cancellationToken\);/' "modules/Trades/TradingJournal.Modules.Trades/Features/V1/Trade/SummerizeTradeHistory.cs")
